What We Offer

Your one-stop marine partner.

Example section. Your own services, such as maintenance, repairs, or yacht management, would appear here, or this section can be removed on request.

From engine repairs to full yacht management, our brokerage has every service your vessel needs, all under one roof in Fort Lauderdale.

Maintenance & Repairs

Routine service, engine overhauls, gel coat and electrical work by certified technicians.

Learn more

Yacht Management

Crew, insurance, maintenance and compliance, handled, so you simply enjoy ownership.

Learn more

Cleaning & Detailing

Waxing, hull cleaning, interior detailing and protective coatings by specialists.

Learn more

Electronics & Systems

Chartplotters, radar, autopilot and custom wiring by ABYC-certified technicians.

Learn more

Sales & Brokerage

Search, survey, sea trials, documentation and escrow, handled end to end.

Learn more

Concierge & Charters

Docking, fueling, provisioning and charter coordination, arranged in every detail.

Learn more

Quality Part Sales

Every part your vessel deserves.

Example section. Your parts and accessories offering would appear here, or this section can be removed on request.

We stock a curated selection of OEM and aftermarket marine parts from the world's most trusted manufacturers. If it isn't on our shelves, we'll source it, fast.

  • Engine components & outboard parts
  • Marine electronics & navigation systems
  • Rigging, hardware & deck equipment
  • Safety equipment & USCG-required gear
  • Interior fittings & upholstery materials
Browse parts catalog
Sample Section

Full-Service Marina

Your home on the water.

Example section. Your marina amenities, slip types, and rates would appear here, or this section can be removed on request.

Set on a protected waterfront, our marina offers state-of-the-art facilities for vessels of all sizes, with 24-hour access and the kind of service that turns a berth into a home port.

Shore power 30 & 50 amp
Fresh water & pump-out
Fuel dock: diesel and gas
24-hour security
Wi-Fi & cable service
Heads, showers & laundry
Haul-out & bottom paint
Transient & annual slips
Marina details

The Craft of the Sea

We are more than a brokerage, this is an expression of nautical excellence.

"Each vessel we represent is an architectural landmark on the water."

Affiniti Yacht Brokerage is a team of yacht brokers specializing in vessels for discerning clients. From hundreds of transactions over our 30 years, Affiniti has earned a strong reputation for exceptional personalized service and integrity. Whether you are a buyer or a seller, our clients benefit from our uniquely qualified team with unparalleled knowledge of the marine marketplace. We make it a point to deeply understand the preferences of our clients coupled with a thorough understanding of available boats, so that we can recommend the best option to match your lifestyle, boating preferences and budget.

Conveniently located in the heart of South Florida, just inside the Hillsboro Inlet, Affiniti Yacht Brokerage serves clients from all over the United States and beyond.

Whether you are buying or selling, in the market for luxury recreational or commercial vessels, Affiniti has an unmatched staff of specialists who not only share a passion for boating but also a deeply grounded knowledge of boat construction and maintenance.  Beyond our proven expertise in evaluating available inventory and negotiating pricing, we are intimately involved in every phase of the transaction, working on your behalf. Our service includes working closely with our client and their certified marine surveyors, helping to understand complex systems and being physically present at any mechanical and hull surveys. This gives our clients the assurance that they are fully informed with complete transparency and are receiving the highest standard of products and service. We believe the cornerstone of our success lies in our motto, “Treat people the way you would want to be treated.”

Surveyed and qualified
Every vessel is independently inspected before listing. No guesswork, no surprises, full documentation provided.
Global reach, personal service
Distributed across 14 international platforms, with dedicated brokers who manage your transaction from first enquiry to final handover.
Escrow-first transaction
Fully transparent process with escrow-protected funds, independent legal review, and a fixed-commission structure.
Exclusive. Global. Personal.
Sell With Us

Your vessel deserves the right buyer, at the right moment.

Our sell-side service covers professional photography, international distribution across 14 platforms, qualified buyer introductions, and seamless closing with full escrow protection. No upfront costs, we succeed when you do.
